<!-- InVideo AI Clone - Full-stack video generation platform -->
# InVideo AI Clone Project

This is a full-stack application that replicates InVideo AI functionality:
- Backend: Node.js + Express with video processing pipeline
- Frontend: React + Vite interface for video generation
- Features: Script generation, scene breakdown, media fetching, TTS, video composition

## ✅ PROJECT COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY!

Full-stack InVideo AI Clone has been created with:
- Complete backend API with video generation pipeline
- Modern React frontend with real-time progress tracking
- Comprehensive documentation and setup instructions
- Ready for development and deployment

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Node.js, Express, FFmpeg, Ollama API, Pexels API
- Frontend: React, Vite, Axios
- Video Processing: FFmpeg, TTS integration
